channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Victorian Studio Portraits Document a Variety of 19th-Century Occupations
item.description: In the 19th century, photography studios became a unique venue for the working class to preserve their professional identities. Unlike candid street photos, these studio portraits presented individual...

item.title: Why Online Verification Systems Are Becoming More Common Due to Smart Bots
item.description: Nowadays, whenever you try to book tickets online, shop, or log into your banking apps, you may be asked to prove that you are human. This is done through systems known as CAPTCHA. Websites have start...

item.title: Zanzibar urges community awareness to prevent extremism and maintain peace
item.description: The Revolutionary Government of Zanzibar (SMZ) has raised alarm over the dangers posed by extremist ideologies, urging citizens to stay vigilant against groups that could threaten peace and stability....

item.title: Avalon Airport evacuated following bomb scare, flights delayed
item.description: Avalon Airport, located near Geelong in Victoria, was placed on lockdown on Thursday morning after a suspicious item was discovered during the security screening process. The domestic terminal was eva...

item.title: ASX futures rise as US-Iran talks boost markets, Zip maintains Australian brand
item.description: Australian shares are expected to open higher, with ASX 200 futures up 104 points or 1.2 per cent at 8633, supported by optimism around ongoing US-Iran peace discussions. US President Donald Trump ind...

item.title: Kylie Minogue: A heartfelt look at the pop icon through her new Netflix documentary
item.description: The new three-part Netflix documentary on Kylie Minogue offers an intimate and refreshing perspective on the pop legend. Unlike many celebrity documentaries that skirt around their subjects, this seri...

item.title: Pauline Hanson Addresses Policy Discussions with Gina Rinehart and Party Positions
item.description: One Nation leader Pauline Hanson has confirmed that she engages in policy discussions with billionaire donor Gina Rinehart but emphasised that Rinehart does not influence the party's policies. Hanson ...

item.title: ONSA and stakeholders support NSIB’s move to become independent accident investigation agency
item.description: The Office of the National Security Adviser (ONSA) and key stakeholders for transportation and security sectors don endorse the federal government plan wey go reposition the Nigerian Safety Investigat...

item.title: Court restrains Adesokan and 10 others from acting as NCAN officials
item.description: An Upper Area Court for Takum, Taraba State don give order make Ademola Adesokan and ten other people no dey present themselves as executives of the National Cashew Association of Nigeria (NCAN). The ...

item.title: India Hosts 12-Nation Military Exercise PRAGATI in Meghalaya to Enhance Regional Cooperation
item.description: The multilateral military exercise PRAGATI 2026 commenced at Umroi Military Station in Meghalaya, India, on Wednesday, bringing together personnel from 12 friendly nations. These countries include Bhu...

item.title: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio to visit India to discuss energy, trade, and defence cooperation
item.description: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio is scheduled to visit India from May 23 to May 26, marking his first official trip to the country. The visit comes amid ongoing hostilities in the Persian Gulf, whi...

item.title: Matthew Perry and Jennifer Aniston Star in 1995 Windows 95 Instructional Video
item.description: In 1995, during the height of their fame on the TV show Friends, Matthew Perry and Jennifer Aniston appeared in a unique promotional video for Microsoft titled the 'Windows 95 Video Guide.' Marketed a...

item.title: Human Rights Group Urges Prosecution of Security Officers Over Unlawful Killings
item.description: The Human Rights Association (HRA) don raise alarm say Nigerian security forces dey operate under culture of impunity, as dem continue dey involved in extrajudicial killings across di country. Dem dey...

item.title: Toronto Police Officers Suspended Following Alleged Incident in Spain
item.description: Three off-duty Toronto police officers were recently arrested in Barcelona in connection with allegations of sexual assault involving a sex worker. The officers, named Rich Rand, Evan Glennie, and Cag...

item.title: SAPS Allocated R127bn for Multi-Year Modernisation and Crime Reduction Strategy
item.description: The South African Police Service (SAPS) has been allocated R127.072 billion for the 2026/27 financial year, with projections rising to R135.8 billion by 2028/29, making it the largest department withi...

item.title: Pune Defence Firm Successfully Tests Indigenous Suryastra Rockets at Chandipur
item.description: A Pune-based defence company has successfully conducted firing demonstrations of the EXTRA and Predator Hawk 'Suryastra' rockets at the Integrated Test Range in Chandipur, Odisha, on 18th and 19th May...

item.title: Agriculture Secretary Attributes Rising Beef Prices to Increased Demand and Supply Challenges
item.description: Agriculture Secretary Brooke Rollins attributed recent spikes in beef prices to a combination of factors, including increased consumer demand linked to the Make America Healthy Again (MAHA) movement l...

item.title: Gujarat Titans prepare to take on Chennai Super Kings in final IPL 2026 league match
item.description: Gujarat Titans (GT) are set to face Chennai Super Kings (CSK) in their last league fixture of IPL 2026 in Ahmedabad. Despite a recent loss to Kolkata Knight Riders ending their five-match winning stre...

item.title: House Approves PRC ID Validity Extension from 3 to 5 Years
item.description: MANILA, Philippines – The House of Representatives approved on final reading a bill aimed at extending the validity of Professional Regulation Commission (PRC) identification cards from the current th...

item.title: Stephen Colbert Bids Farewell to The Late Show Amid Controversy
item.description: Stephen Colbert, the much-loved host of CBS’s The Late Show, is signing off after a controversial cancellation that has shaken the late-night TV landscape. Over recent weeks, the Ed Sullivan Theatre i...
